messages.content:
You are comparing multiple specification documents to determine which are most relevant to a question.

Question: What are the recommended approaches for implementing computer vision-based 3D reconstruction on mobile devices?

Documents:
1. Photorealistic 3D Scanning SDK - Approach Comparison
   Summary: Compares three technical approaches for 3D scanning: CV/AI (pure computer vision), LiDAR-only, and Hybrid. Recommends starting with CV/AI approach using RGB camera, Structure from Motion, and Multi-View Stereo for universal iOS device compatibility.
   Top Sections: Approach 1: Medida-Style CV/AI (Recommended), Approach 2: LiDAR-Only, Approach 3: Hybrid
   Keywords: computer vision, CV/AI, photogrammetry, Structure from Motion, Multi-View Stereo, iOS, universal compatibility

2. Photorealistic 3D Scanning SDK - Technical Architecture
   Summary: Defines high-level system architecture including image capture, feature detection, SfM engine, MVS engine, AI enhancement, texture mapping, and measurement extraction. Uses AVFoundation, ARKit, RealityKit, Metal, Vision, and Core ML frameworks.
   Top Sections: High-Level Architecture, Data Flow Diagram, Core Processing Pipeline
   Keywords: architecture, image capture, feature detection, SfM, MVS, RealityKit, Metal, Core ML

3. Photorealistic 3D Scanning SDK - Feature Detection System
   Summary: Detailed specification for feature detection using SuperPoint (deep learning) and SuperGlue (neural network matching). Includes RANSAC outlier rejection and sub-pixel refinement with performance targets < 200ms per image.
   Top Sections: Configuration, ML Models, Performance Requirements
   Keywords: SuperPoint, SuperGlue, feature detection, RANSAC, Core ML, on-device inference

4. Photorealistic 3D Scanning SDK - Performance Requirements
   Summary: Defines performance targets for processing time (< 2 min total), memory usage (< 2GB peak), accuracy (±2mm), and device compatibility (iPhone 8+, iPad Air 3+).
   Top Sections: Processing Time Targets, Memory Usage Targets, Accuracy Targets, Device Compatibility
   Keywords: performance, processing time, memory usage, accuracy, device compatibility

5. Photorealistic 3D Scanning SDK - Technical Challenges
   Summary: Addresses implementation challenges including feature detection in low-texture areas, lighting variations, memory management, real-time performance, and accuracy vs. speed trade-offs. Provides solutions using GPU acceleration, adaptive quality, and AI enhancement.
   Top Sections: Challenge 1: Feature Detection, Challenge 4: Real-Time Performance, Challenge 5: Accuracy vs. Speed
   Keywords: challenges, solutions, GPU acceleration, Metal, adaptive quality, mobile constraints

Rank these documents by relevance to the question.

Response format:
{
  "rankings": [
    {
      "rank": 1,
      "document": "Photorealistic 3D Scanning SDK - Approach Comparison",
      "relevance_score": 0.95,
      "reasoning": "Directly addresses the question by comparing three CV-based approaches for mobile 3D reconstruction with specific recommendations",
      "relevant_sections": ["Approach 1: Medida-Style CV/AI (Recommended)", "Approach 3: Hybrid"]
    }
  ]
}

Return only valid JSON. Rank all documents.
